blended.narrative: Stowe is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 54°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
